--- 
title: "Productie"
author: "Devise"
params:
  client: "rav_drenthe"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    scrolling: true
    theme: cosmo
    expandable: false
server: shiny
---

<script src="https://kit.fontawesome.com/cbd54b6f03.js" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>


```{js, code = readLines(paste0(rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file(), "/Library/rmd/dashboard_qmd.js"))}
```

```{css}
.quarto-dashboard .card .card-body {
  z-index: unset !important;
}

div[data-title="Productie"] .form-group.shiny-input-container {
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: baseline;
}

div[data-title="Productie"] label.control-label {
  padding-right: 0.4em;
}

div[data-title="Gemiddelde tijdsduren"] .cell-output-display.html-fill-item.html-fill-container.no-overflow-x {
  flex: unset;
}

```

```{r}
#| context: setup
#| include: FALSE

source(paste0(rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file(), "/Library/rmd/params.R"), local = T) 
setwd(rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
source("Library/rmd/init_dashboard.R")
db <- import("Library/database/db.R")

config <- list(
  client = params$client
)
if(config$client == "rav_drenthe") {
  config$province <- "Drenthe"
} else if(config$client == "rav_fryslan") {
  config$province <- "Friesland"
}

db_con <- db(database = config$client, tables = "ambulance_task_edaz", single_table_name = F)
```



```{r}
highchartOutput("graph_aantal_inzetten")
```

```{r}
#| context: server

output$graph_aantal_inzetten <- renderHighchart({
  db_con$count(time_column = "receive_task_datetime",
               time = "monthly") |>
    arrange(x) |>
    visualize$graph(interactive = T,
                    theme = list(spline = list(marker = T)),
                    types = list(spline = T),
                    options = list(navigator = T,
                                   export_enabled = T),
                    labels = list(title = texts$add_date_zoom(text = "Aantal inzetten",
                                                              date_zoom = "monthly"),
                                  x = "",
                                  y = "Aantal inzetten"))
})

```
